title: Build a Multi-Group YAML Inventory
description: Create a YAML inventory with webservers and dbservers groups, a parent datacenter group, and set ansible_user for webservers.
starterCode:
# Create a YAML inventory file
# Requirements:
# - Group 'webservers' with web1.example.com and web2.example.com
# - Group 'dbservers' with db1.example.com
# - Parent group 'datacenter' containing both webservers and dbservers
# - Set ansible_user: deploy for the webservers group
all:
  children:
    # Add your groups here
solutionCode:
all:
  children:
    webservers:
      hosts:
        web1.example.com:
        web2.example.com:
      vars:
        ansible_user: deploy
    dbservers:
      hosts:
        db1.example.com:
    datacenter:
      children:
        webservers:
        dbservers:
hints: In YAML inventory, groups go under 'all.children'

validationRules.errorMessage: YAML is not valid — check indentation

simulatedOutput.success:
Inventory validation passed!

Groups found:
  datacenter (parent)
    webservers: web1.example.com, web2.example.com
    dbservers: db1.example.com

Group vars:
  webservers: ansible_user=deploy

Total hosts: 3
simulatedOutput.failure: Inventory validation failed. Check that all required groups exist and YAML is valid.
